idea-plugin.name: Agent Workbench
idea-plugin.description:
AI-first development workflow plugin for IntelliJ-based IDEs.
  • Global Prompt Palette — press Cmd+\ / Ctrl+\ from anywhere to start a new task or continue an existing one. Automatically captures invocation context (selection, file, symbol) and attaches it as context chips.
  • Agent Threads — provider-agnostic, project-scoped browser that aggregates sessions from multiple AI providers (Codex, Claude) into a single tree view grouped by project and worktree.
  • Chat Editor Tabs — each thread opens in a dedicated terminal-backed editor tab with persistent state across restarts.
  • Dedicated Frame Mode — optionally routes all AI chat into a separate IDE frame for parallel task orchestration alongside your normal project window.
  • Prompt Context Providers — extensible context system that collects editor selections, VCS changes, project-view selections, and test-runner results to enrich prompts automatically.
Experimental — features are under active development and may change without notice.
